docTitle: Bibilo ken Mpase Môm · Hii sha Mgbe zan zan Nyumshima

share.title: Bibilo ken Mpase Môm
share.text: Ken mpase môm tsô, fa kwaghôron u vesen u Bibilo — man er Yesu A va yô.

ui.loveLabel: Dooshima u a kera ende ga

s.ui.footer: Bibilo ken Mpase Môm · Avur a icighanruamabera ka sha TOBNR
s.hero.kicker: HII SHA MGBE ZAN ZAN NYUMSHIMA
s.hero.title:
Bibilo,
ken mpase môm
s.hero.sub: Ken mpase môm tsô, fa kwaghôron u vesen u Bibilo — man er Yesu A va yô.
s.thread.eyebrow: KWAGHÔRON U MÔM U A KÔÔM AKAA CII LA
s.thread.h2: Mtôôv u i kar yô, Bibilo ka kwaghôron u môm tsô
s.thread.note: Aôndo tôô ityendezwa (ikyua), ior kohol shighe u gbenge, man mtôôv akaa cii kuma shi kure kpaa ken Yesu. Dondo akaa a 13 a ken inya ne sha gbenda u nahan — bende sha “Ôr seer” sha kar môm môm sha u fan kwaghôron seer.
s.gospel.eyebrow: ER KWAGHÔRON NE A LU SHA CI U “MO” YÔ
s.gospel.lead: Bibilo ka takerada u tesen er “lu or u dedoo” ga.
s.gospel.sublead: Ka kwaghôron u er Aôndo, sha mhôôn tsôô, A yima mbaasorabo mba ve fatyô u yiman ayol a ve ga la. Ken atô u kwagh ne tile Yesu Kristu.
s.gospel.mirror:
Gbenda u Iserael u a kera bee ga la ka ikyav i “mo” je

Mciviraeev→Ican→Mliam→Aôndo yima→Mciviraeev shi…

Hii sha Mbaajiriv zan zan ken mkohol, Iserael eren gbenda ne sha won sha won. Bibilo nger kwagh ne sha u se gôhôr er, “Ka or u kiriki je ve nahan la ga.”

Ka ikyav-iyol. Ka u kaan ér “Iserael er nahan” ga kpa ka u kaan ér “mo kpaa m eren kape i môm la” (1 Mbakorinte 10:11).

Eev ka kwagh u i gbe sha kon tseegh ga. Ka hanma kwagh u se soo shin se suur a mi a hemba Aôndo — inyaregh, mtsehe, mlumun u ior, ior, shin mo iyol yam je kpaa. Man u yaren tom a Aôndo er kwagh u zuan a mlu wam kpaa ka mciviraeev je.

Mtôôv u i kar yô, eev u hemban yô ka “mo iyol yam, m tem sha ikyônough ki tartor ki Aôndo.”
s.gospel.coreIntro: Nahan kape Aôndo yima orsorabo ne nena? Heen ka ishima i Loho u Dedoo u Bibilo i ôron ne.
s.gospel.crux:
Bibilo cii i tese ijiir i môm tsô.

Ior fatyô u paven gbenda u isholibo sha ayol a ve ga, man or u perapera kpaa lu môm ga. Sha nahan yô, gba u or nana kimbi injar sha ityough ki ve.

Yesu va sha u tesen akaa a dedoo tseegh ga. Er gbenda ugen u yiman mo lu ga yô, gba u Una va je.

Or u yange nana lu sha terankon la ka mo.
Yesu tôô isholibo yam A vande Un sha kon her sha ityough kam.

“Kpa i kuma Un sha ci u akaabo ase, i vihi Un iyol sha ci u aferakaa a ase … ka sha igbidiv Nav man i wanger se ye.” — Yesaia 53:5
s.faq.h: Inja i kwagh môm ngu nyoon u her kpaa?
s.faq.q1: ▸ Nahan orwuanor ka una na jighjigh tsô una za sha nyumshima, kpa or u yange nan lu uma u dedoo kpa nan na jighjigh ga la una za token?
s.faq.a1:
Ka mpin u dedoo. Kpa mtsegh uhar ngu yer ken mi.

① Bibilo i palegh ior sha “mba dedoo man mba bo” ga. Ikyav i kar yô ka “hemban or u tile her” ga, kpa ka “mlu wang u kuren ku Aôndo.” Sha ishigh Nagh yô, or u tile er “nan lu dedoo u kuma” kpaa ngu ga (Mbaromanu 3:23). Nahan ka “or u dedoo a orwuanor” ga, kpa ka er ior uhar mba i angev a vihi kang kang — or môm ngohol ikyange, ugen yô venda i kaan ér, “Mo m hemba nan lu wang.”

② Kwagh u môm tsô u palegh nyumshima a token. Ka mlu u aeren ga, kpa aluer u ngohol Yesu Kristu er Ter wou man asorabo ou kar yô. Or u awambe a Kristu kar asorabo na yô nan za sha nyumshima; or u nan ngohol Un ga, asorabo na shi her la nan za ga. Aeren a dedoo cii fatyô u paven we a asorabo ou je ga.

Sha nahan yô, nyumshima a token ka “injar u aeren a dedoo” ga, kpa ka kwagh u mzough a Kristu. Man “jighjigh” ka mlumun u ishima tseegh ga, kpa ka mgem u or u eren a uma na — or u nan ngohol Un mimi yô nan hingir or u tem sha ikyav ga, kpa nan gema asema kpishi. Sha mimi yô, mlu u or eren ér “mo m lu dedoo” ka eev u taver u haren je, u a ne or henen ér nan soo Kristu ga la (Luka 18:9-14).

Bibilo ôr a wang er: “U nan ne Un jighjigh yô, á ôr nan ijir ga, kpa u nan ne jighjigh ga yô, i na nan ibo kera je ve” (Yohane 3:18). Ijir ka “mer asorabo ou zum u u kpe” ga, kpa i kure i sha aluer u ngohol Kristu shin u ngohol Un ga.

Mbaromanu 3:23 · Yohane 3:18 · Mbaefese 2:8-9 · Luka 18:9-14
s.faq.q2: ▸ Aluer m lu uma u dedoo tsô kpa m na Yesu jighjigh ga yô, kwagh ne kuma ga?
s.faq.a2:
Ka mhen u ior kpishi ve eren, kpa i kaven mimi u zayol la ga. Nenge ikyav ne.

Wuese er we ngu sha tso u mbaheenfemen yô. Aluer u wanger sha tso vindi vindi, u eren ior dedoo, u lu uma u dedoo cii kpaa, we lu orheenfen her, gadia tso la ngu zan a we a we ijiir i u ngu zan la (ijiir i ijir). Zayol ka “injar u aeren ou” ga, kpa ka “tso u u lu sha mi” (we iyol ou).

Sha nahan yô, Loho u Dedoo kaan ér “nôngo kpishi sha u lun u dedoo” ga; i kaan ér “gema tso.” Due sha tso u isholibo u za sha Yesu — sha iyol i he i wan u Aôndo. Ka u seer injar ou sha nôngo ga, kpa ka u suur Un u A samber a ave Na la we kar za sha tso Na.

Sha mimi yô, Bibilo ôr myiman er nahan kpaô: “A yima se A due a vese ken tahav mbu imev kera A nyôr a vese ken tartor u Wan Na u doon ishima” (Mbakolose 1:13).

De kaven mi shami ga: kwagh ne ka u kaan ér uma u dedoo lu a inja ga. Mlu u dedoo ka “gbendaakaa” u nyumshima ga, kpa ka atam a mi. Or u gema tso kar yô nan eren kwagh u dedoo sha mciem ga, kpa sha dooshima u wan.

Mbakolose 1:13 · Yohane 1:12 · Yohane 3:3 · Mbaefese 2:8-9
s.faq.q3: ▸ Aluer orbo nan ember ishima nan kaan ér “Aôndo dem asorabo am” kpa or u i er nan bo la ngu yan ican je yô, mdoom shami la nan hôô shin?
s.faq.a3:
Mpin la ka u mimi, man ican la ka i jighjigh. Kpa mkaan u nahan la ka “mdoom u Bibilo” ga — ka mgemyол u u.

① Mdoom u Aôndo ka u shami ga. I cir isholibo er “kwagh la er ga” nahan ga; Aôndo iyol Na kimbi injar u sholibo sha uma u Wan Na. Terankon ka ikyav i tesen er i ngohol isholibo wuese ga, kpa ka i tesen er isholibo ngi ihyom kpishi — ka mdoom u injar i hemban cii shin tar.

② Mgemshima u mimi ne atam. Aluer orbo tile sha ishigh ki or u i er nan bo la nan kaan ér “Aôndo dem mo, m ngu bem bem,” mlu la ka mgemshima ga, kpa ka mtsegh u mgemshima (Mateu 3:8). Man mdoom u atô u or man Aôndo la nan ese ican i or u i er nan bo la ga, shi nan tindi or la sha u nana dema kpaa ga.

③ I de isholibo er “i kar ga” ga. I kimbi hanma isholibo sha ajiir uhar — shin Kristu tôô i sha terankon (sha mba ve suur Un la ibo i kera lu ga, Mbaromanu 8:1), shin or u nan venda Un zan zan la nan tôô i iyol na. Nahan mdoom u shami ngu ga. Orbo la kpaa nan ngu a ityom sha atindi a shin tar ne (Mbaromanu 13:1-4).

④ Mliam ma or u i er nan bo la ka kpuaa sha ishigh ki Aôndo ga. Aôndo vaan a mba ve vaan, A umbur hanma mliam, man masetyô yô Una ese a sha ave Na (Mpase U Yohane 21:4). Sha nahan yô or u i er nan bo la kpaa nan tôô ityough ki oran iyev sha ityough ki nan tsmôô ga, kpa nan fatyô u naan Aôndo u perapera la ian (Mbaromanu 12:19 — “Ka Mo Me or iyev ye, ka Mo Me kimbi ye, kape Ter A kaa la”).

Mateu 3:8 · Mbaromanu 8:1 · Mbaromanu 13:1-4 · Mpase U Yohane 21:4
s.faq.q4: ▸ Bibilo ka kwaghôron u mimi je shin? I lu inja er kwagh u tsuaa shin takerada u i nger sha ishima la.
s.faq.a4:
Ka mpin u dedoo — man ka mhii u dedoo kpaa. Mtaver-ishima ka kwagh u nan a jighjigh igbar ga, kpa ka msoo u pavshima a akaa sha mimi. Bibilo ka kwagh u tsuaa u i kaan ér “suur aluer u soo” ga, kpa ka mnger sha ityough ki ajiir, ayange man ior mba mimi. Ikyav ikyumeishi tsô.

① Ka takerada môm ga kpa ka “ya u utakerada” — kpa cii i zenden sha kwagh u môm tsô. Bibilo ka mkohol u utakerada 66 mba i nger ken anyom er 1,500 sha ave a ior er 40 nahan — utor, mbakuraniyôngo, mbakôronishu, orngoholinyaregh, ortwer, ior mba mlu kposo kposo man shighe kposo kposo, mba i nger kposo kposo kpa ve fa ayol a ve ga ye, ken ijô itar (Heberu, Arami, Grika). Kpa akaa cii zough sha ijiir môm, gbilin ga, sha kwagh u môm tsô: myiman sha ikyev i Kristu. Ka mzough u taver u kaan ér ka sha ahembe shin sha mzough u ior ga la.

② I za hii kuren a sha tar (mlu u kohon akaa a tsuaa). Akaa kpishi a tsuaa a i vande venden er ka mtsue, “i zua a mi ken Bibilo tsô” la, masetyô i kohol a tese mimi ve. Ikurior i Davidi sha won u i nger sha mi ér “ya u Davidi” (Won u Tel Dan); Pontiu Pilatu, gomna u A wua Yesu la, sha mnger u a tese iti na; iwer i mngerem i tor Hesekia (2 Utor 20:20), sha iwer la iyol na man mnger u sha mi. Kua Mbahiti, mba i vande yilan er “ior mba tsuaa” la, ve due er ikurior i vesen ken aaja.

③ Ka takerada u tsuaa u i kura tsembelee hemban (avumakaa). Sha mzough u avumakaa a a shi her, sha mzough ve a ayol a ve, man sha shighe u i lu hen mnger u hii zan zan u i ngeren u kindin, Bibilo ngu a ikyange ken utakerada mba tsuaa cii ga. Mpande u Yesaia u u lu cii Kristu ngu va la, ken Mpande mba Zegemnger u Ku (i zua a ve sha 1947), zough vough a mnger u i ngu eren sha anyom er 1,000 ne — ka ikyav i tesen er i kura Bibilo tsembelee sha shighe cii.

④ Akaa a i vande ngeren la er nahan je a er (mpase u mprofeti). Icighanruamabera u Tse, u i nger anyom kpishi cii Yesu va la, tese mar Na ken Betelehem (Mika 5:2), Ortom u ican (Yesaia 53:5), man akaa a sha terankon (Pasalmi 22), wang wang. A wang kpishi je u i venden er ka mzough tsô la ga.

⑤ Mbangeren-akaa-a-tsuaa mba ve lu Mbakristu ga kpaa nger kwagh Na. Orngeren-akaa-a-tsuaa u Roma Tasitu man orngeren-akaa-a-tsuaa u Yuda Yosefu — môm ve lu Orkristu ga — ve ter Yesu, mwua Na, man nongo u Mbakristu u tsuaa la. Hemban cii, mbahenen mba ve samber sha mcie la ve ver uma ve sha u pasen mnder u Yesu sha ku — or u kpen sha kwagh u nan fe ér ka aie la ngu ga.

Sha mimi yô kpa, akaa ne tese er u suur Bibilo ka kwagh u inja shio ga, kpa ka u inja; ka “ikyav” i i taver er or er hen mngerem er mbamzough la ga. Sha nahan yô mtaha u Orkristu i due sha ikyav tseegh ga, kpa i due sha jighjigh u Icighan Jijingi A na ishima zum u or henen Kwagh u Aôndo la. Bibilo kaan ér: “Jighjigh u nan ka sha m-ongo, m-ongo di gema ka sha kwaghôron u Kristu” (Mbaromanu 10:17). Sha nahan yô, aluer i lu inja er kwagh u tsuaa nahan kpaa, u henen u iyol ou ka mhii. Ikyav bugh hunda, man mtaha seer ken or u henen la.

2 Utor 20:20 · Yesaia 53:5 · Mika 5:2 · Mbaromanu 10:17
s.respond.h3: Nahan — sha kwagh wam yô nena?
s.respond.sub: Dooshima ne ka kwaghfan ga, kpa ka mlôhô. Aluer dooshima u i vande sha ityough kou la zough a ishima ou yô, er msen ne hegen, sha gba uper uper, sha hilang.
s.respond.prayer:
Aôndo,

M lumun mer mo m lu orsorabo u m fatyô u yiman iyol yam ga.

M na jighjigh mer Yesu A kpe sha ci wam sha terankon man A nder shi.

De asorabo am cii, man hii nyian hingir Ter u uma wam.

Ngohol mo er wan wou, man na mo m lu uma u he.

Ka ken iti i Yesu m eren msen ne ye. Amen.
s.respond.after: Aluer u er msen ne sha ishima ou cii yô, Bibilo kaan ér u hingir wan u Aôndo. U kera lu tswen ga — keren nyianegh ki kegh u una ngohol u, man zenden gbenda u jighjigh imôngo a mbagenev.
s.respond.read: Ôr Bibilo iyol ou — hii a Yohane
s.respond.verse: “Kpa mba ve rumun Un la yô, ve cii A na ve tahav mbu vea hingir ônov mba Aôndo.” — Yohane 1:12 · Mbaromanu 10:9-10
s.closing.main:
Aôndo môm,
sha kwaghôron u môm,
ngu keren se a
dooshima u a kera de ga.
s.closing.verse: “ku shin uma … shin ma kwagh ugen u i gbe un a gba kpaa, una fatyô u paven se a dooshima u Aôndo u a lu ken Kristu Yesu Ter wase la je ga.” — Mbaromanu 8:38-39
s.closing.small:
Sha kwaghôron ne, Atindi, utakerada mba upasalmi, mbaprofeti, man uwasike i seer “iyol.”
Hegen yô, hanma takerada u u bugh kpaa, u fa “ape u lu ken kwaghôron la.”
s.about.line: I lu sha mnenge u nyumshima u sha kwaghyiman, u evangeli · u Riforimd u nongo u Mbakristu mba Mbaprotestanti mba Korea cii ve ngu a mi la.
s.about.contact: Mbampin · mbamhen — Nger se imeil
s.closing.map: Kwaghôron ne cii lu er ken ajiir a mimi — dondo u sha mapu

epochs.title: Mgbe
epochs.one: Aôndo gba tar u u lu “dedoo kpishi.”
epochs.events: Ayange a ataratar a mgbe, or u i gbe sha ikyav i Aôndo, mmem u iyange i sha sieer
epochs.q: Sha hiihii Aôndo gba Sha man tar:
epochs.christ: I gba tar sha ikyev i “Imo.” Loho u Dedoo u Yohane ôr ér Imo ne ka Yesu iyol Na (Yohane 1:1-3).
epochs.detail:
Bibilo i hii a mzough u mhenen ga, kpa i hii a mpase: “Sha hiihii Aôndo gba…” Tar lu sha aie ga, kpa ka tom u Aôndo u a lu or la.

  • Ikyav i Aôndo · ken akaa a uma cii, ka or tseegh i gbe nan kuma a Aôndo — u fan Un man u kuran tar.
  • Mmem · mmem u iyange i sha sieer i tese er akaa cii kar shi lu bem (shalom): “lu dedoo.”
  • Edhen · tar u cii vihi ga, ape Aôndo man ior ve zende imôngo la.
epochs.next: Kpa myôm ne ngu va vihin…

epochs.title: Mgbough
epochs.one: Isholibo nyôr, man mzough u atô u ior man Aôndo paa.
epochs.events: Myan u atam a i venda la, mlee ken Edhen, mva u ku man tom u nyoon
epochs.q: Me ver ihom hen atô wou vea kwaseman … u ua cagh u ityough
epochs.christ: Ityendezwa i hiihii i Loho u Dedoo, i i na zum u mgbough kar yô: “vor u kwase” una cagh ityough ki iyô — man ka Yesu je la (Genese 3:15; Mbaromanu 16:20; Mbagalatia 4:4).
epochs.detail:
Sha mhendan a Aôndo u soon u “lun er Aôndo” la, isholibo nyôr ken tar. Mkure na ka mhendan a tindi tseegh ga, kpa ka mpav u mzough.

  • Mzough u i paa · a Aôndo (myeren), a ayol a ve (mwen), man a akaa a sha tar (uvaha man tom u nyoon).
  • Ku · mwanger u “ú kpe je” hingir mimi.
  • Genese 3:15 · kpa ken atô u ijir, ityendezwa i myiman i hii van. Mbatimenkwagh yila i ér “protoevangelium” (Loho u Dedoo u hii).
epochs.next: Hegen Aôndo yila or môm sha u hiin a myiman…

epochs.title: Mbatertamen
epochs.one: Aôndo tôô ityendezwa hen Aberaham ér, “Ú hingir igbenda i averen.”
epochs.events: Ikyua i Aberaham, mtôô u Isaka, ônov mba Yakob mba pue kar uhar, Yosef hingir hemen ken Igipiti
epochs.q: Me er u, ú hingir ikurior i vesen … ka ken a we je akuraior a sha won cii aa zua a iveren ye.
epochs.christ: Ityendezwa i ér “akuraior cii aa zua a iveren” la i kuma ken Yesu, vor u Aberaham (Mbagalatia 3:16).
epochs.detail:
Aôndo hii u soron zayol u uumace cii sha u yilan or môm, Aberaham. Ishima i kwagh ne ka ikyua (ityendezwa) — ikurior i vesen, tar, man “iveren sha ci u akuraior cii.”

  • Jighjigh u nan · Aberaham na ityendezwa i i nengen a mi ga la jighjigh, man i ôron un perapera (Genese 15:6).
  • Isaka man Yakob · ityendezwa kar za hemen; Yakob (Iserael) mar ikpinaior pue kar uhar.
  • Yosef · anngôôv na tee un kpa A za un sha hemen — “Aôndo yô, lu a awashima u dedoo sha kwagh la” (Genese 50:20).
epochs.next: Sha u dondon Yosef, tsombor la kar shin Igipiti — shi hingir ikpan…

epochs.title: Mdugh man Deserete
epochs.one: Aôndo yima ior mba ve lu ikpan la A hingir ve mba Na.
epochs.events: Uange pue, Paseka, mper u Zegemngerem u Nyian, Atindi Pue ken Sinai, tempel u shate, anyom 40 ken deserete
epochs.q: Me ngohol ne, né hingir Mo ikurior, Me lu Aôndo wen
epochs.christ: Paseka — ape awambe a waniyôngo a yima sha ku la — i tese Yesu, “waniyôngo wase u Paseka,” u i mande Un sha terankon sha ci wase (1 Mbakorinte 5:7).
epochs.detail:
Myiman u hemban cii ken Icighanruamabera u Tse. Iserael, u u lu ikpan la, zua a myende sha agee a Aôndo shi hingir ior Na.

  • Paseka · ya u i nger awambe a waniyôngo sha hunda la ku kar a mi — ka ikyav i nagh cii a va dondon la.
  • Zegemngerem u Nyian · myiman ape gbenda bee la; “mper za sha won” hingir ikyav i mhii u he.
  • Ikyua i Sinai · sha Atindi Pue ve henen er vea lu uma er ior mba Aôndo nahan.
  • Tempel u shate · icighanya u i fatyô u tôôn u u Aôndo A lu ken atô u ior Na — mtem-iyange u “Imanuel.”
  • Anyom 40 · mhendan na ikurior môm zende deserete, kpa Aôndo lu vea ikyô a mana man icôgh i ibiam man i usu.
epochs.next: Ve tile sha azwa a tar u ityendezwa la, ve wa iyol sha u nyôron…

epochs.title: Mhembe man Mbaajiriv
epochs.one: Ve zua a tar, kpa er tor lu ga yô, hanmô gbaa eren kwagh u nan soo.
epochs.people: Yosua; mbaajiriv er Gideon man Samson; Rutu
epochs.events: Mgbough u Yeriko, mtem ken Kanaan, gbenda u isholibo–ijir–myiman u a kera ende ga
epochs.q: Sha ayange la tor lu ken Iserael ga; nahan hanma or gbaa eren kwagh sha ishima i nan tsô.
epochs.christ: Hen ya u Rutu Davidi due ken mi, man hen ya u Davidi Yesu due ken mi (Mateu 1). Ken zayol kpaa, ikurior i Mesia ende u zenden ga.
epochs.detail:
Hen ikyev i Yosua ve nyôr ken tar u ityendezwa, kpa er ve tem yô, shighe kese ve hungur Aôndo. Mbaajiriv ka gbenda u môm u a kera ende ga.

  • Gbenda u shin inya · isholibo → ican → mliam → orjir yima → isholibo shi. I za vihin seer.
  • Mbaajiriv · Gideon, Samson, Debora — mbayiman mba sha shighe la tseegh, mbahembanagee kpa mba a asorabo kpishi.
  • Rutu · kwaghôron u wang u jighjigh ken shighe u ime; kwasewanetar nyôr ken ikurior i Davidi (man i Yesu).
epochs.next: Ior gbidye mliam ér, “Na se tor kpaa!”…

epochs.tag: ICIGHANRUAMABERA U TSE · SHIGHE U DEDOO
epochs.title: Tartor u i Zer la
epochs.one: Aôndo tôô ityendezwa hen Davidi ér, “Ikônough kou kia tem gbem sha won.”
epochs.events: Tor u hii Saul, Davidi man Goliat, ikyua i Davidi, Solomon maa tempel
epochs.q: Ya wou kua tartor wou vea tile dông sha ishigh you gbem; ikônough you ki torough kia lu her gbem sha won.
epochs.christ: “Ikônough ki gbem sha won” i kuma ken Yesu, wan u Davidi — sha nahan i yila Un “Wan u Davidi” (Luka 1:32-33; Mateu 1:1).
epochs.detail:
Shighe u dedoo u Iserael, sha ikyev i utor utar.

  • Saul · tor u hii u ior soo la; mhii u dedoo kpa mhendan vihi un.
  • Davidi · “or u sha ishima i Aôndo.” Nan hemba Goliat shi maa Yerusalem hingir ngerenya. Nan er isholibo i vesen (Batseba) kpa nan gem ishima sha ishima cii (Pasalmi 51).
  • Ikyua i Davidi (2 Samuel 7) · Aôndo tôô ityendezwa u veren ikurior i Davidi gbem sha won — mzough u ishima i mkohol u mesianik.
  • Solomon · sha hemen u kwaghfan man inyaregh nan maa tempel, kpa ken masetyô nan gema sha mciviraeev.
epochs.next: Sha shighe u Solomon kar yô, tartor paa har…

epochs.title: Tartor u i Paa la
epochs.one: I paa ken angahar (Yuda) man imbusu (Iserael), tartor za sha mtim.
epochs.people: Utor mba sha hanma tartor; mbaprofeti er Eliya, Yesaia, Yeremia
epochs.events: Tartor paa, mciviraeev samber, mbaprofeti pase mwanger
epochs.q: Kape Iserael hendan a ya u Davidi la, zan zan nyian ne.
epochs.christ: Ken shighe ne mbaprofeti pase Mesia u una va la wang seer (Yesaia 9:6; Yesaia 53).
epochs.detail:
Sha ayange a wan u Solomon tartor paa: tartor u imbusu u Iserael (ikpinaior pue, ngerenya Samaria) man tartor u angahar u Yuda (ikpinaior ihar, ngerenya Yerusalem).

  • Iserael (imbusu) · hanma tor civir aeev; i gbough sha ikyev i Ashiria sha 722 cii Kristu.
  • Yuda (angahar) · ikurior i Davidi za hemen, utor mba dedoo môm môm er Hesekia man Yosia, kpa cii i tumbe.
  • Mbaprofeti · Eliya, Amoshi, Yesaia, Yeremia gbidye mliam ér “gema nen!” Mpase u mesianik kuma sha mtsue heen (“Ortom u ican” u Yesaia 53).
epochs.next: Masetyô ijir i i vande pasen la va — i tee ve ken ikpan…

epochs.title: Mkohol
epochs.one: Tartor gbough man i tee ior za ken ityar i ken won.
epochs.events: Iserael gbough sha ikyev i Ashiria (722); Yuda gbough sha ikyev i Babilon man i nyer tempel (586)
epochs.q: Hen uifi mba Babilon la, se tema heregh, se lu vaan, zum u se lu umbur Shion yô.
epochs.christ: Ken atô u mkpeshima cii Yeremia tôô ityendezwa i “ikuryan i he” (Yeremia 31:31) — ikyua i môm i Yesu A wa sha kwaghyan u masetyô la.
epochs.detail:
Mwanger kar hingir mimi. Tempel nyie man i tee ior za ken Babilon — ve hingir banzaôr u tar, tor, man tempel: ijiir i shin inya cii.

  • Mgbough uhar · Iserael (Ashiria, 722 cii Kristu) man Yuda (Babilon, 586 cii Kristu).
  • Daniel · ikyav i jighjigh ken atô u ya u tor u civir aeev (ihime i ibua); nan nenge mpase u “tartor u gbem sha won” u una va la.
  • Icôgh i ishima · mpase u akeke a kpiir a hingiren uma (Esekiel 37) man “ikuryan i he” u Yeremia i tese hemen ken ime la.
epochs.next: Anyom akundu sha won, Aôndo bugh gbenda — ve hide hen ya…

epochs.title: Mhide hen Ya
epochs.one: Ve hide ve maa tempel man azende.
epochs.events: Mhide sha mtindi u Sairus, mmaa u tempel, msoron u azende a Yerusalem, mhide u Kwagh u Aôndo
epochs.q: iember i ne ember TER la ka agee a en je
epochs.christ: Malaki, takerada u masetyô u Icighanruamabera u Tse, kure sha u pasen ortyom u una sôr gbenda u Mesia la: “M ngu tindin ortyom Wam” (Malaki 3:1).
epochs.detail:
Sha mtindi u tor u Persia Sairus (538 cii Kristu) mhide hii. Sha mpaver mzough utar ve hide ve maa akaa a vihi la.

  • Serubabel · maa tempel (i bee sha 516 cii Kristu).
  • Esera · tese Kwagh u Aôndo shi man nan jighjigh hingir uma.
  • Nehemia · maa azende a Yerusalem sha ayange 52.
  • Eseter · yima Mbayuda mba ken Persia sha mtim — “sha shighe er u ne.”
  • Mzendenkeghen u her · tempel tile, kpa tor er Davidi nahan lu ga. Ior kohol Mesia.
epochs.next: Tsô… er Sha mem yô, anyom 400 kar.

epochs.tag: ATÔ U ICIGHANRUAMABERA U TSE MAN U HE · MWA U TSO
epochs.title: Anyom a Mem
epochs.one: Anyom 400 a imo i profeti i lu ga — kpa i wa tso shami shami.
epochs.events: Persia → Grika → mtaver-iyol u Mbamakabe → mtor u Roma
epochs.q: Kpa er shighe va kuma vough yô, Aôndo tindi Wan Na, kwase va mar Un, i mar Un sha ikev i tindi,
epochs.christ: “Mwa u tso” cii ne lu tom u Aôndo sha u Yesu Una va vough “zum u shighe kuma” la.
epochs.detail:
Hii sha Malaki zan zan ken Icighanruamabera u He, anyom er 400 kar a kwaghôron u he u Bibilo ga. Kpa hen ijime i akaa a eren la, Aôndo lu wan gbenda sha u Loho u Dedoo una samber.

  • Atartor a gema · Persia → Grika (Alesander, 333 cii Kristu) → Mba Ptolemi man Mba Seleukid → mtaver-iyol u Mbamakabe (167 cii Kristu) → Roma (63 cii Kristu).
  • Zwa Grika · mhembe u Alesander na zwa Grika hingir zwa u môm; i gema Icighanruamabera u Tse ken zwa Grika (Septuagint), i bugh gbenda u Loho u Dedoo una samber fefa.
  • Igbenda man bem u Roma · igbenda i dedoo man “Pax Romana” hingir igbenda i mpase u Loho.
  • Usinagog man mbamzough · mtesen u sinagog tser; Mbafarisi man Mbasaduki due; man mkohol u Mesia beenyô.
epochs.next: Tsô mem mgba — masetyô, Un va.

epochs.title: Yesu Va
epochs.one: Mesia u i tôô ityendezwa la va, A kpe, shi A nder.
epochs.people: Yesu, mbahenen mba pue kar uhar, Yohane Orbatisema
epochs.events: Mva ken iyol (Krismse), tom Na u tesen man ivande, ku sha terankon, mnder sha iyange i tar
epochs.q: Man Imo la hingir or je, va tema her a vese … mgbough a mrumun u sha mhôôn man mimi kpaa.
epochs.christ: Vor u kwase (kar 2), iveren i Aberaham (3), waniyôngo u Paseka (4), tor u Davidi u gbem sha won (6), ikuryan i he (8) — cii i kuma ken or môm, Yesu: Orprofeti, Orpristi, man Tor wase u mimi.
epochs.detail:
Mem mgba; U i tôô ityendezwa la va. Avangeli anyiin pase kwagh u uma, ku, man mnder u Yesu sha ahembe anyiin.

  • Mva ken iyol · Aôndo hingir or (Imanuel, “Aôndo a vese”), ken ijiir i hôô i Betelehem.
  • Tom · A tese tartor u Aôndo, A bee uangev, A yila mbaasorabo. “Or u nan nenge a Mo yô, nan nenge a Ter ye.”
  • Terankon · A kimbi injar u isholibo man ku u mgbough va a mi la (kar 2). Waniyôngo u mimi u Paseka.
  • Mnder · sha iyange i tar A nder, A cir agee a isholibo, ku, man Satan — sha terankon je A “A ngohol mbatarev man mbautahav mba sha kwavaôndo la ikav … A hemba ve” (Mbakolose 2:15).

Sha nahan Yesu ka Orprofeti wase u mimi (u tesen gbenda u zan a Aôndo), Orpristi wase u mimi (u nan iyol Na sha u kimbin isholibo), man Tor wase u mimi (u hemban isholibo, ku, man Satan shi u tor gbem sha won).
epochs.next: Yesu u A nder la tindi mbahenen Na ken tar…

epochs.title: Nyianegh ki Hii
epochs.one: Jijingi va, man Loho u Dedoo samber zan zan ken ikighir i tar.
epochs.events: Mtwer u Jijingi sha Pentekosti, mar u nyianegh, Loho samber hii sha Yerusalem zan zan Roma sha ikyev i mtev
epochs.q: Kpa né va ngohol agee shighe u Icighan Jijingi Una va sha a ven yô, man né lu mbapasen kwagh Wam ken Yerusalem … zan zan á ar ken ikighir i tar je.
epochs.christ: Kwaghôron ne ngu zan hegen je. Bibilo kure sha u tôôn ityendezwa ér Yesu Una hide va shi Una gema akaa cii hingir a he (Mpase U Yohane 21).
epochs.detail:
Yesu A kundu sha won kar yô, Jijingi u i tôô ityendezwa la va sha Pentekosti man i mar nyianegh. Loho u Dedoo samber fefa kpishi.

  • Pentekosti · Jijingi gema mbahenen mba ve lu cian mcie la hingir mbashiada mba taver asema.
  • Peteru · pase Loho u Dedoo hen Mbayuda ken Yerusalem.
  • Paulu · hii er ortev hingir apostoli, maa nyianegh ken tar u akuraior a sha won shi nger uwasike.
  • Zan zan ikighir i tar · Yerusalem → Yudia → Samaria → Roma. Ityendezwa i Aberaham i “akuraior cii” la hingir mimi.
  • Man se kpaa · kwaghôron bee ga; ka u zan hemen sha mhide u Yesu man Sha man tar u he.

epochs.title: Msoron (akaa cii a hingir a he)
epochs.one: Yesu hide va shi A gema akaa cii hingir a he.
epochs.people: Yesu u Una hide va; akuraior cii
epochs.events: Mhide u Yesu, ijir i masetyô, mbee u isholibo·ku·mliam, Sha man tar u he
epochs.q: Una ese ve mliam sha ashe kera cii, ku ua kera lu ga, shin ijungwen shin mliam shin ican kpaa ia kera lu je ga.
epochs.christ: Edhen u mgbe u hii la i sôr un masetyô er “Yerusalem u He.” Aôndo tema vea ior Na gbem sha won — mkure u Imanuel (Mpase U Yohane 21:3; Mateu 1:23).
epochs.detail:
Bibilo i kure sha shighe u nyianegh ga. Takerada u masetyô na, Mpase, tese Yesu er A hide van sha u kuren akaa cii.

  • Mhide · Tor u i tôô ityendezwa la hide va sha icivir.
  • Mhembe u masetyô · Satan man ku i tim ve gbem sha won, man Kristu tor er Tor u Utor (1 Mbakorinte 15:25-26; Mpase U Yohane 20:10).
  • Ijir man mnder · i sôr hanma kwaghbo, man mbakpenev nder shin ku.
  • Sha man tar u he · isholibo, ku, mliam, man ican kar gbem sha won (Mpase U Yohane 21:4).
  • Edhen u i sôr la · ken “Yerusalem u He” u u hembe u hii la, Aôndo tema vea ior Na gbem sha won — ijiir i Bibilo cii i lu zan sha mi la.

Sha nahan hegen ka shighe u “i kar, kpa i bee ga”: ken Yesu myiman i kar kuren, kpa mkure u mi i kohol her.
epochs.next: Nahan kwaghôron ne cii a lu sha ci u “mo” yô nena?

love: Kwaghôron i hii a ijir ga, kpa a mgbe u i gbe sha dooshima u shaaôn la.
Zum u ior er isholibo la, Aôndo tôô ityendezwa i myiman her je.
Aôndo va hii sha or u nan kuma a mi ga la, A yila nan a iti i nan, A hingir nan igbenda i averen.
A ungwa mhungun u ior mba ve lu ikpan la, A hide iyol Na A va yima ve.
I nyaman Un sha won sha won, kpa hanma shighe u ve gbidye mliam yô A tindi oryiman A nder ve shi.
A vende Davidi u A gbe la kpaa ga; sha ikyev i nan A tôô ityendezwa i tor u gbem sha won.
Hen ior mba ve gema un imbusu la A za tindin ve mbaprofeti, A zaan ér, “Hide nen va ya.”
A za vea ve zan zan ken tar u ime u mkohol kpaa, A tôô ityendezwa i msoron.
Hen ior mba ve gba kohol kohol kpaa A vande tôôn ityendezwa Na ga, kpa A nder ve shi.
Hen anyom a mem a 400 kpaa, sha ijime, A lu wan gbenda u myiman.
Zum u se lu mbaasorabo her la, A tindi Wan Na A na uma Na.
Dooshima u se ngohol la, hegen A tindi u u za sha tar cii.
Masetyô Una ese hanma mliam shi Una sôr akaa cii sha dooshima.

mis.w: “Er nyi Aôndo gbe or u nana fatyô u eren isholibo? Aluer A gbe nan ga yô, doo hemban ga he?”
mis.t: Aôndo gba tar man or sha ican u nan lu a mi ga, kpa sha dooshima u shaaôn. U gban or er or u nana zua a mzough a Aôndo ka dooshima je iyol na. Man mva u isholibo kpaa lu ken atô u gbenda u myiman u Aôndo (Mbaefese 1:4-5). Kar u hii u Bibilo ka ijir ga, kpa ka dooshima.

mis.w: “U leen man u zuan a ku sha u yan atam a môm tseegh — Aôndo lu kahôn or hemban ga he?”
mis.t: Mlee ken Edhen lu ijir shi lu mhôôn imôngo. Aluer or, sha mpav a Aôndo shi mzough paa nahan la, nan ya sha kon u uma nan lu uma gbem sha won yô, nan lu ken ican gbem sha won (Genese 3:22). U den ku ka u bughun gbenda u mhiden; man her je Aôndo tôô ityendezwa i Oryiman (Genese 3:15). Dooshima vande lu ken atô u ijir.

mis.w: “I tsough Aberaham sha jighjigh u nan u hemban — ior mba ken Bibilo cii ka mbahembanagee mba sha kwaghdedoo ga he?”
mis.t: Aberaham kpaa er aie shi nan tsam ishima, man Yakob lu orgenegh. Aôndo yila ior mba “ve kuma” la ga, kpa A yila mba ve kuma ga la sha mhôôn. Inja i mtsough lu mlu u ve u dedoo ga, kpa lu dooshima u jighjigh u Aôndo (Duteronomi 7:7-8).

mis.w: “Tindi (Atindi) ka mker shin gbendaakaa u or nana kar sha u zuan a myiman ga he?”
mis.t: Aôndo yima ve cii A na ve tindi la. Atindi Pue je a hii sha mpase u myiman: “Ka Mo TER, M lu Aôndo wou, u M dugh a we ken tar u Igipiti” (Ekesodu 20:2). Tindi ka “kuran u sha u zuan a myiman” ga, kpa ka mtwese u dooshima u tesen er ior mba i vande yiman ve sha mhôôn la vea lu uma yô (Duteronomi 7:7-9). Mhôôn ka u vande hii; mtindi ka mlumun u i ne.

mis.w: “Mhembe u Kanaan lu mwuanior u mhôôn shio — Aôndo u Icighanruamabera u Tse lu kahôn je.”
mis.t: Ka kwagh u i fatyô u kuren sha kwaghôron môm ga shi u soon u veren ishima. Kpa Bibilo i tese un er ipila i shio shio ga, kpa er ijir u i er sha kwaghbo u tsung u anyom kpishi (kua mtôô u mbayev) la, sha mhom kpishi (Genese 15:16; Duteronomi 9:4-5; Levitiku 18:24-25). Aôndo i fer fer sha u eren ijir kpaa ga, man or u nan gema hen A yô A ngohol nan a iember, aluer ka orgenetar je kpaa er Rahab man Rutu nahan (Yosua 6:25; Rutu 4:13-17).

mis.w: “Davidi lu orhembanagee u asorabo lu ga — sha nahan i yila un ‘or u sha ishima i Aôndo.’”
mis.t: Davidi er idya shi nan wua or kpaa. “Or u sha ishima i Aôndo” inja na lu or u asorabo lu ga ga, kpa lu or u nan yer isholibo na ga — nan gem ishima cii shi nan hide hen Aôndo gbem (Pasalmi 51). Dooshima u Aôndo i vende or u nan gba kang kang kpaa ga.

mis.w: “Profeti ka oryidiwer u pasen akaa a hemen / Aôndo u Icighanruamabera u Tse lu iyugh tseegh.”
mis.t: Ishima i profeti lu “mpase u akaa a hemen” ga, kpa lu mliam ma Aôndo ma ican ér: “Hide nen va.” Mwanger u ijir je kpaa i soon u timin ga, kpa i soon u geman ior u nan ve uma — “Ku u iferor doom ga” (Esekiel 33:11).

mis.w: “Mkohol tese er Aôndo undu Iserael cii.”
mis.t: Mkohol lu mundu ga, kpa lu mtsaha man msoron u Ter hen wan u nan soo (Mbaheberu 12:6). Aôndo yem ga; A lu vea Daniel ken atô u mkohol shi A tôô ityendezwa ér, “M fa mbamhen mba M lu henen sha a ven ne … ka mhen u bem … sha u nan ne ishimaverenkeghen i dedoo ken masetyô” (Yeremia 29:11).

mis.w: “Aluer kwaghôron lu ga anyom 400 yô, alaghga Aôndo yem shin lu memen?”
mis.t: Mem ka mlu ga ga. A ôr kwagh tsô ga, kpa shighe la cii A lu geman atartor, ijô, man igbenda sha u wan tso u myiman. Ken shighe u mem hemban la, Aôndo lu eren tom hemban cii, sha dooshima (Mbagalatia 4:4).

mis.w: “Yesu lu ortesen u dedoo môm tseegh / terankon lu mhembe u i mande.”
mis.t: Yesu kaa ér Un iyol Na ka Aôndo (Yohane 8:58), man terankon lu aie shin mhembe u i mande ga, kpa lu dooshima u i wa tso na. I tee Un sha agee ga, kpa Nan iyol Na gbihi uma Na (Yohane 10:18). “Or ngu a dooshima u a hembe ngun ga, je u or nana gbihi uma u nan sha ci u akar a nan” (Yohane 15:13).

mis.w: “Nyianegh ki Aôndo ka mkohol u ior mba asorabo lu ga, shin ka iyou tseegh.”
mis.t: Nyianegh ki Aôndo ka mzough u “mbatseren mba ve kuma” ga, kpa ka u mbaasorabo mba i dem ve la. Apostoli Paulu iyol na kpaa yila iyol na ér “mo m hembe” mbaasorabo (1 Timoteu 1:15). Nyianegh ki tsuaa kpaa anyiman shi gba kohol kohol (Aerenakaa A Mbaapostoli 6:1; 1 Mbakorinte 1:11). Ka ijiir i wuese iyol ga, kpa ka ior mba ve karen dooshima u ve ngohol la (Yohane 13:34-35).

core.title: Isholibo i mar a mi — or u perapera ngu ga
core.body: Zayol ka “aeren a bo kpuaa” ga, kpa ka mhii u ishima. Hii sha Adam, ior cii i mar ve ken isholibo man ve fatyô u zan sha Aôndo sha ayol a ve ga.
core.vtext: Or u perapera ngu ga, môm tsô kpaa ga … Gadia ior ca ca ve er isholibo nahan kera mba a iengem i Aôndo ga.

core.title: Tindi fatyô u yiman mo ga
core.body: Tindi ka tswen u i tôô za sha won ga, kpa ka iyol-i-yol. Hanma er m nôngo u kuren un yô, ka u u tese er m gbe akaa kpishi. Inja na ka u zan a vese ken Kristu.
core.vtext: Nahan sha aeren a sha atindi yô, a na ma or u umace ishô sha ishigh Nagh ga, gadia ka sha atindi man i fe asorabo ye … Kape tindi a lu orkuran wase u zan a vese ken Kristu sha u i̱ na se ishô sha jighjigh u nan yô.

core.title: Sha mhôôn — iwua, lu sha nôngo ga
core.body: Myiman ka injar u aeren a u kar la ga, kpa ka iwua i Aôndo hen or u nan kuma a mi ga la. Sha nahan or fatyô u wuese iyol na ga.
core.vtext: Gadia ka sha mrumun u sha mhôôn i yima ne ye, sha jighjigh u nan. Man kwagh ne yô, ka her a ven a dugh ga, ka iwua i Aôndo. Ka sha tom u eren ga, sha er ma or nana̱ de te ihagh ga.

core.title: I ôron se ishô sha jighjigh u nan
core.body: Sha u kuren tindi ga, kpa sha jighjigh u nan ken Yesu Kristu i ôron se mbaperapera — i wuhe se a perapera wase ga, kpa a u Na.
core.vtext: Nahan yô, er i ne se ishô sha jighjigh u nan yô, se mba bem bem a Aôndo sha Ter wase Yesu Kristu … or gbe zuan a ishô sha aeren a sha tindi ga, kpa ka sha jighjigh u nan ken Kristu Yesu.

core.title: Bibilo i tese Yesu
core.body: Bibilo ka kwaghôron u mbahembanagee shin takerada u wasen iyol ga. Hii sha Genese zan zan ken Mpase, hanma kar pase kwagh u or môm — Yesu Kristu.
core.vtext: Ne mba timen ken icighanruamabera … ka ve je ve pasen kwaghwam ye … A gba pasen ve akaa a sha iyol Na ken Icighanruamabera cii.

core.title: Tartor u Aôndo — ishima i kwaghôron u Yesu
core.body: Kwagh u Yesu A tese hemban cii. Tartor u Aôndo A lu Tor sha mi la nyôr ken tar a Yesu shi una kure zum u Una hide va. Sha terankon man mnder Na, Yesu ka Tor u mimi u A hemba isholibo, ku, man Satan la.
core.vtext: Ayange kuma, tartor u Aôndo mgbôghom ve; gema nen asema, na nen Loho u Dedoo ne jighjigh.

core.title: Loho u Dedoo — Un kure akaa cii
core.body: Injar u isholibo u mo m fatyô u kimbin ga la, Yesu kimbi sha ityough kam sha terankon, man sha mnder Na A hemba ku. M tile sha “er nahan” ga, kpa sha “bee ve.”
core.vtext: Bee ve … Kpa Aôndo tese se dooshima Na sha ku u Kristu A kpe sha ci wase er se lu mbaasorabo her la.
